tools.name: ZenBusiness
tools.description: LLC formation in 10 minutes. Starts at $0 + state fees. They handle the paperwork so you don't have to.

tools.name: LegalZoom
tools.description: Business formation, operating agreements, and trademark registration. Premium but thorough.

tools.name: IRS EIN Application
tools.description: Free. 5-minute form. You need this before you open a bank account.

tools.name: Mercury
tools.description: Free business banking designed for startups. No fees, no minimums, great app. NOVI team recommended.

tools.name: Relay
tools.description: Free business checking with automatic profit allocation. Great for separating owner pay from business expenses.

tools.name: Square
tools.description: Accept card payments in person at events, pop-ups, or your treatment location. Reader is $49.

tools.name: Stripe
tools.description: Online payment processing for your website and booking links.

tools.name: Wave
tools.description: Completely free accounting software. Invoicing, expense tracking, and reports. Perfect for your first year.

tools.name: QuickBooks Self-Employed
tools.description: $15/month. Auto-categorize expenses, mileage tracking, and quarterly tax estimates.

tools.name: Keeper Tax
tools.description: AI-powered tax deduction finder. Scans your bank for write-offs you're missing. $16/month.

tools.name: Hiscox
tools.description: Malpractice + general liability for aesthetic providers. Online quotes in minutes. $30–50/month.

tools.name: CM&F Group
tools.description: Specialized medical malpractice for nurses, NPs, and PAs. They understand aesthetics.

tools.name: NEXT Insurance
tools.description: General liability and professional liability bundled. Fully online, instant COI generation.

tools.name: Google Business Profile
tools.description: Free. 10 minutes. Shows up when someone searches 'Botox near me' in your city. Non-negotiable.

tools.name: Canva Pro
tools.description: Design before/afters, social posts, and marketing materials. Templates made for aesthetics. $13/month.

tools.name: Later
tools.description: Schedule Instagram posts in advance. Plan your whole week in 20 minutes.

tools.name: Mailchimp
tools.description: Email marketing for patient follow-ups, promotions, and newsletters. Free up to 500 contacts.

tools.name: NOVI Courses
tools.description: Hands-on clinical training with certification. Required for NOVI MD coverage activation.
